name: Simple skill — no scripts
query: Build a Claude Code skill that formats commit messages from staged git diffs following Conventional Commits. Category: dev.
expected_behavior: Name uses gerund form, kebab-case, ≤64 chars, lowercase+hyphens only, no reserved words
Description starts with 3rd-person verb and includes 'Use when' with 3+ trigger phrases
Description is ≤1024 chars with no XML tags
Front matter uses ONLY standard fields (name, description, argument-hint, etc.) — no license, metadata, category, version, or generated-by
Front matter total is under 1024 characters
All SOP steps begin with an imperative command verb
Output includes correct mkdir path for Claude Code ecosystem (~/.claude/skills/)
No time-sensitive information (no dates, version numbers, trending tools)
Includes input/output example pairs demonstrating the expected commit message format
References are one level deep from SKILL.md (no nested chains)
